"'''Unseen, Unheard'''" is a 6-page black and white comic featured in ''[[Star Wars Tales 24]]'' (later collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 6]]''). It is a story told from the perspective of [[Visas Marr]], telling how she became the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] to [[Darth Nihilus]] after the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Conclave at Katarr]] was destroyed.

==Plot summary==
It is 4,000 years before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] colony of [[Katarr/Legends|Katarr]] a [[Miraluka/Legends|Miraluka]] female sits peacefully and gazes at the beauty of her [[Planet/Legends|world]] through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], unaware that her people have less than an hour left to live. Unbeknownst to them, their [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Subspecies/Legends|race]] has attracted the attention of an unusual [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], one who sustains himself through death in the Force.

The [[Conclave at Katarr|Devastation of Katarr]] by way of the Sith Lord's considerable [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] sends an echo, through the Force, of the screams of countless lives in which the female Miraluka sees the death of all living things on her world. Unconscious and near death herself, the Miraluka is taken aboard the [[Ravager (Centurion-class)|''Ravager'']], a seemingly destroyed ship of the Sith Lord, where she is healed of her injuries.

Upon awakening, the Miraluka does not know where she is or why she has been spared. Seeking out the Sith Lord, she suddenly becomes aware that the answer to her question is that the Sith Lord wants her people, at last, to ''see''.

==Continuity==
Although the female Miraluka and the Sith Lord are not identified in the comic, players of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' can recognize Visas Marr as the Miraluka and Darth Nihilus as the Sith Lord.

While the comic does not specify an exact date for the events in the story, ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'' gives the date [[3952 BBY]] as the date of the Jedi Conclave on Katarr, which is considered responsible for the devastation of Katarr.
